memoryArtifacts.headline: Visitation of Cumberland and Westmorland--Dacre of Gilsland
History of William Dacre (1315-1398)
memoryArtifacts.description:
He was the son of Richard Cave (see Cave-Browne-Cave baronets) and Margaret Saxby of Stanford, Northamptonshire and was educated at Cambridge University. He was knighted by 1525.

He was a Member of …

memoryArtifacts.headline: Baron William Dacre According to Wiki
memoryArtifacts.description: William Dacre, 5th Baron Dacre (1357–20 July 1398)[1] was an English nobleman and soldier. He was born in 1357, son of Hugh Dacre, 4th Baron Dacre and his wife Ela Maxwell, daughter of Alexander Maxwe …

zh.lifeSummary: 當William Dacre於1357年10月28日出生在英國諾圖波藍德吉爾曼德時，他的父親Hugh Dacre23歲，母親Elizabeth Maxwell23歲。他於1379年之前與Joan Douglas在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1398年7月20日在英國波藍德納沃斯享年40歲，埋葬在英國波藍德萊納爾可斯特聖 瑪麗 馬格達萊也斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Dacre于1357年10月28日出生在英国諾圖波藍德吉爾曼德时，他的父亲Hugh Dacre23岁，母亲Elizabeth Maxwell23岁。他于1379年之前与Joan Douglas在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1398年7月20日在英国波藍德納沃斯享年40岁，埋葬在英国波藍德萊納爾可斯特聖 瑪麗 馬格達萊也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Dacre
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from either of two places called Dacre, one in Cumbria, the other in Yorkshire.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When William Dacre was born on 28 October 1357, in Gilsland, Northumberland, England, his father, Hugh Dacre, was 23 and his mother, Elizabeth Maxwell, was 23. He married Joan Douglas before 1379, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 20 July 1398, in Naworth, Cumberland, England, at the age of 40, and was buried in St Mary Magdalene's Church, Lanercost, Cumberland, England.

fr.Lanercost Priory, Lanercost, Cumberland,: St Mary Magdalene's Church, Lanercost, Cumberland, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Dacre est né le 28 octobre 1357, à Gilsland, Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, Hugh Dacre, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Maxwell, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Joan Douglas avant 1379, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 20 juillet 1398, à Naworth, Cumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 40 ans, et a été enterré à St Mary Magdalene's Church, Lanercost, Cumberland, Angleterre.

de.Lanercost Priory, Lanercost, Cumberland,: St Mary Magdalene's Church, Lanercost, Cumberland, England
de.lifeSummary: Als William Dacre am 28. Oktober 1357 in Gilsland, Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh Dacre 23 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Maxwell 23. Er hat vor 1379 in England, United Kingdom Joan Douglas geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 20. Juli 1398 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Naworth, Cumberland, England und wurde in St Mary Magdalene's Church, Lanercost, Cumberland, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Dacre è nato il il 28 ottobre 1357 nel Gilsland, Northumberland, England, il suo padre, Hugh Dacre, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Maxwell, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Joan Douglas prima del 1379, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 20 luglio 1398, nel Naworth, Cumberland, England, all'età di 40 anni, e fu sepolto a St Mary Magdalene's Church, Lanercost, Cumberland, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William Dacreが1357年10月28日にイギリスノースウンバーランドギルスランドで生まれた時，父Hugh Dacreは23歳，母Elizabeth Maxwellは23歳であった。1379年以前にイギリスイギリスでJoan Douglasと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1398年7月20日にイギリスクウンバーランドナウオルスで40歳で死去し，イギリスクウンバーランドランエルコストスト マリー マグダリーネ'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.Lanercost Priory, Lanercost, Cumberland,: 영국 쿠벌랜드 랜르코스트 스트 메리 막그다렌'스 처르치
ko.lifeSummary: William Dacre(이)가 1357년 10월 28일 영국 노르스벌랜드 길슬랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh Dacre(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Maxwell(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1379년 이전 영국 잉글랜드에서 Joan Douglas(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1398년 7월 20일 영국 쿠벌랜드 나워스에서 40세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 쿠벌랜드 랜르코스트 스트 메리 막그다렌'스 처르치에 묻혔다.

pt.Lanercost Priory, Lanercost, Cumberland,: St Mary Magdalene's Church, Lanercost, Cumberland, Inglaterra
pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Dacre nasceu em 28 de outubro de 1357, em Gilsland, Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh Dacre, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Maxwell, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Douglas antes 1379, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 20 de julho de 1398, em Naworth, Cumberland, Inglaterra, com 40 anos, e foi sepultado em St Mary Magdalene's Church, Lanercost, Cumberland, Inglaterra.

ru.Lanercost Priory, Lanercost, Cumberland,: ст мэри магдеилине'с чурч, ланиркост, кумбирланд, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Dacre родился 28 октября 1357 г. в местности джилсланд, нортумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Hugh Dacre было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Maxwell, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Douglas перед 1379 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 20 июля 1398 г. в местности наворт, кумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 40 лет и был похоронен в местности ст мэри магдеилине'с чурч, ланиркост, кумбирланд, Англия.
